final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a product launch campaign featuring 长安起源Q06.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, visually striking presentation-cover aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide-format cover layout with title and subtitle prominently placed over the background
Subject: must include 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a translucent, immersive, high-impact background — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 长安 brand identity — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of depth and translucency in the background treatment — exact surface execution is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title, large), "9月上市" (subtitle, secondary)
Constraints: must preserve PPT cover proportions (16:9 wide format); title and subtitle must be legible over background
Avoid:
